title: Armor Trim Abilities
description: Adds a base power and full set power to every Armor Trim. Each power tackles a different gameplay mechanic.
body:
Introducing the Armor Trim Abilities Data Pack – an innovative addition to your Minecraft world that introduces a dynamic layer of power and customization to your armor sets. This data pack enables you to enhance your armor's capabilities by adding distinct abilities through the application of armor trims. Elevating gameplay, strategy, and customization, this data pack offers a fresh perspective on how armor can impact your adventures. Video Showcase: https://youtu.be/8B-2QyKSHXA ### [key features](https://github.com/TQNL/Armor-Trim-Abilities/wiki) *press link for wiki* Balanced gameplay is a key focus, with each power crafted to include strategic limitations, encouraging thoughtful use and tactical decisions. The pack also offers flexibility; since abilities are mutually exclusive, you can tailor your armor’s strengths to match your preferences. If you wish to change your strategy, trims can be easily removed using a grindstone, eliminating the need for extensive crafting. To ensure a seamless experience, the data pack includes a reboot mechanism: if an ability is lost due to unexpected events, such as using a totem, simply removing and re-equipping the armor restores the power. Additionally, abilities refresh automatically when your armor takes damage. The power granted by a trim remains constant, independent of the material of the trim or armor, streamlining the customization process. I recommend my [Common Smithing Templates Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/common-smithing-templates) for this particular project ### issues You can report problems on [the gitbub page](https://github.com/TQNL/Armor-Trim-Abilities/issues), **include your minecraft version**. *This data pack might conflict with data packs that alter (decorated pots) in trial chambers.*
*This data pack might conflict with software that alters the inventory crafting grid when using the full Bolt Armor Trim set.* ### notice - If you want to support small creators like me, you can turn off ad blocker. - Check out my profile for more creations: https://modrinth.com/user/TQNL Keep in mind: - Ensure you're familiar with installing data packs. Verify compatibility with your Minecraft version. Terms of use: Do: - Use and modify the data pack for private use. - Credit me (ThijquintNL) as the creator when using the data pack in public, such as in video showcases, or when editing and redistributing the original material. Don't: - Redistribute the data pack for commercial purposes. Under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 license
